chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 65 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 1. For orders on MA No.729/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 3. For orders on MA No.730/2023 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of protective bail 15.08.2023 Mr. Ali Akbar Narejo, Advocate for applicant/accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgent application is granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Through this bail application, applicant/accused Akbar Ali, son of Shahzado, by caste Narejo, seeks protective bail in Crime No.251 of 2019 of Police Station ‘B’ Section, Khairpur, registered for offences under Sections 302, 324, 353, 147, 148, 149, 337-H, P.P.C. and Sections 6/7 of Anti-Terrorism Act, 1997. Learned Counsel for the applicant/accused contends that the applicant is innocent, but he has been implicated by the complainant owing to tribal dispute. He further contends that the applicant/accused is ready to appear before the Court concerned along with an application under Section 498, Cr.P.C. to prove his innocence, however, he apprehends his immediate arrest as non-bailable warrants has been issued against him; hence, he seeks protective bail. Without touching merits and de-merits of the case, protective bail for a period of seven days w.e.f. 15.08.2023 to 21.08.2023 (both days inclusive) is granted to the applicant/accused subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Rupees thirty thousand) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court.

He further contends that the applicant/accused is ready to appear before the Court concerned along with an application under Section 498, Cr.P.C. to prove his innocence, however, he apprehends his immediate arrest as non-bailable warrants has been issued against him; hence, he seeks protective bail. Without touching merits and de-merits of the case, protective bail for a period of seven days w.e.f. 15.08.2023 to 21.08.2023 (both days inclusive) is granted to the applicant/accused subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Rupees thirty thousand) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. Operation of non-bailable warrants in this case shall remain suspended during aforesaid period of seven days. Applicant/accused Cr. Bail App. No. D – 65 of 2023 Page 2 of 2 is directed to surrender before the Court concerned in the aforementioned period. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of above seven days period or whenever the applicant/accused surrenders before the Court concerned, which one occurs earlier. It is made clear that in case the applicant/accused fails to surrender before the Court concerned within stipulated period, his bail bond shall stand automatically forfeited. Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
